activities.name: 24 Hour Fitness - Push day
activities.description: Bench, OHP, dips. Stiff but pushed through.

activities.name: Marin Headlands loop
activities.description: Bridge to Sausalito to Hawk Hill and back. Beautiful day. Legs feeling strong.

activities.name: McLaren Park - softball doubleheader
activities.description: Two games. Went 3 for 7. Roberto with the walkoff.

activities.name: GGP evening spin
activities.description: After work spin. Fog rolling in.

activities.name: Saturday GGP long ride
activities.description: Through the park out to Ocean Beach and back twice.

activities.name: Presidio out-and-back
activities.description: Tunnel Tops and back. Sunset was unreal.

activities.name: Saturday Marin loop
activities.description: All the way to Tiburon and back via Sausalito. PR on the bridge climb.

activities.name: GGP Sunday spin
activities.description: Easy day with Elena watching from the playground.

activities.name: McLaren Park - softball doubleheader
activities.description: Won game 1 12-4. Lost game 2 5-7. Hot day.

activities.name: Saturday GGP long
activities.description: Through GGP twice plus Ocean Beach.

activities.name: GGP Sunday family ride
activities.description: Easy ride with Elena. She's getting fast.

activities.name: Saturday Marin loop
activities.description: Tiburon and back. End of summer form.

activities.name: 24 Hour Fitness - Push
activities.description: Last push session before pre-op week.

activities.name: Saturday Marin Headlands
activities.description: Last big one before surgery. Hawk Hill felt easy.

activities.name: Saturday Marin loop
activities.description: Tiburon loop. Knew this would be the last big one for a while.

activities.name: McLaren Park - softball
activities.description: Last game of the regular season. Won 9-6.

activities.name: GGP last ride pre-op
activities.description: Last spin before surgery on Monday. Easy pace. See you in October.

activities.name: GGP: First ride back
activities.description: Back on the bike after 5 months. Legs were heavy the first mile but loosened up around Spreckels. Taking it easy.

activities.name: GGP Saturday loop
activities.description: Two weeks in. Extended the loop past Spreckels. Foggy morning but clear by 10.

activities.name: Presidio + GGP out-and-back
activities.description: Longest ride since September. Took it through the Presidio. Not fast but I'm out here.
